wiki.summary: "BEAUTY AND THE BEAST" is a single released by Kanye West that was created with intent for his eleventh released solo album, Bully. The song heavily samples the song "Don't Have To Shop Around" by The Mad Lads. The song was said to date back to the Donda sessions by producer MIKE DEAN. It's unclear which era. The song was first previewed in full during the VULTURES listening party in China on September 28, 2024. The song was briefly posted in full on Kanye's Instagram page on October 15, 2024. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "BEAUTY AND THE BEAST" is a single released by Kanye West that was created with intent for his eleventh released solo album, Bully. The song heavily samples the song "Don't Have To Shop Around" by The Mad Lads. The song was said to date back to the Donda sessions by producer MIKE DEAN. It's unclear which era. The song was first previewed in full during the VULTURES listening party in China on September 28, 2024. The song was briefly posted in full on Kanye's Instagram page on October 15, 2024. The vocals on the chorus of this version of the song seemed to be much more refined than the vocals shown at the Haikou listening party. The song was officially released just three days later as the lead single to Bully on October 18, released exclusively onto Apple Music with an accompanied music video. Read more on Last.fm.
